data.name: Hentai Tales: Under Her Watch Forbidden Lessons
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

在挑戰燒腦謎題的同時享受香豔刺激的劇情！
將棋盤上的數字依序連接，且需填滿所有方格
每次解開謎題即可解鎖全新香豔新圖與後續劇情篇章！
你能否解開所有謎題，與女孩們全員相會呢？！

故事背景

我的黑皮假小子青梅竹馬千夏提出要進行「親密特訓」——終於點燃了危險的火種。
如今病嬌女友雪菜正追查著我身上殘留的背叛氣味。
在忠誠與慾望的夾縫間，少女們的戰爭已然爆發。
究竟會是誰的特訓讓我淪陷？
而這份代價將會是......？...

登場角色

森下千夏：

天然無自覺的誘惑魔女(165cm・X罩杯)
曬黑膚色的田徑少女暗藏爆乳身形
毒舌且好強，卻比誰都重情義
笨拙的「特訓」卻意外喚醒禁忌情愫
這次絕不會輕易拱手相讓

神崎雪菜：

病嬌系宣示主權者(Q罩杯・哥德蘿莉風)
蒼白肌的雙馬尾禁忌之戀狂
熱衷收集我所有動向的「現任女友」
肌膚上殘留的背叛氣息......
她的愛總是染著血色

遊戲特色

  • 收錄20張性感撩人的美少女圖片
  • 演繹獨特個性少女們的夢幻情色物語
  • 可略過解謎環節直接享受劇情 (解謎中按下Enter鍵)
  • CG鑑賞模式 (解謎完成後點擊CG兩側箭頭按鈕)

*具備完整音效支援的語言

  • 顯示卡: 512MB
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間

data.name: Hentai Tales: Under Her Watch Forbidden Lessons
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

My tomboy childhood friend Chinatsu offered "private lessons" in intimacy – sparking something dangerous.
Now my obsessive girlfriend, Yukina, hunts the scent of betrayal clinging to me.
Trapped between loyalty and desire, their rivalry ignites.
Whose lessons will claim me?
And at what cost?...

Characters

Chinatsu Morishita:

The Unintentional Temptress (165cm, X-Cup)
Sun-kissed track star with explosive curves.
Brash, athletic, and fiercely loyal.
Her clumsy "lessons" awaken forbidden feelings.
She won’t lose me without a fight.

Kanzaki Yukina:

The Yandere Claim (Q-Cup, Gothic Lolita)
Pale, twin-tailed beauty with chilling obsession.
Possessive "girlfriend" who collects my traces.
Smells sin on my skin…
Her love bleeds crimson.

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
